subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God, my Beloved, my most cherished Hope and Desire! I beseech Thee by the fire of Thy Word
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و محبوبی و غایه رجائی و مقصودی اسئلک بنار کلمتک التی بها
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for forgiveness
